prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/333-deck.key in Keynote (3 slides labelled Slide1, Slide2, Slide3 in their titles). In the slide navigator, drag slide 3 to the top so it becomes slide 1. The new order should be Slide3, Slide1, Slide2. Save. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/333-rearrange-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
